_comment: Example GitHub 'issues' webhook delivery (action=labeled) that triggers the agent. Trimmed to the fields the github-app reads: action, label.name, issue.labels[].name, issue.number/title/body, repository.owner.login + name, sender. See apps/github-app/src/filters and docs/github-app-permissions.md.

issue.title: add() returns wrong result for negative numbers
issue.body: add(-2, 1) returns -3 but should return -1. Please fix and keep tests green.
